raw_text:
<think>
The user asks: "packet_id=HVSF016HA-B2FBED6E9D535E4F3229
status_values:
route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
Return the three-line status record."

We must return plain text record with three key=value lines. The fields, in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move. So we need:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

No extra lines, headings, explanations, JSON, Markdown, etc.

Thus answer should be exactly:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

We should also include the packet_id? The user says "Return the three-line status record." The status record includes the three lines, not the packet_id. So just the three lines.

Thus answer.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
